code: module.exports = { actions: { async readAccel(api, input, state) { const d = await api.sensors.getAccelerometer(); if (!d) { return { accel: 'Accelerometro: non disponibile' }; } return { accel: 'Acc x:' + d.x.toFixed(2) + ' y:' + d.y.toFixed(2) + ' z:' + d.z.toFixed(2) }; }, async readGyro(api, input, state) { const d = await api.sensors.getGyroscope(); if (!d) { return { gyro: 'Giroscopio: non disponibile' }; } return { gyro: 'Giro x:' + d.x.toFixed(2) + ' y:' + d.y.toFixed(2) + ' z:' + d.z.toFixed(2) }; }, async readMag(api, input, state) { const d = await api.sensors.getMagnetometer(); if (!d) { return { mag: 'Magnetometro: non disponibile' }; } return { mag: 'Mag x:' + d.x.toFixed(2) + ' y:' + d.y.toFixed(2) + ' z:' + d.z.toFixed(2) }; }, async readAll(api, input, state) { const a = await api.sensors.getAccelerometer(); const g = await api.sensors.getGyroscope(); const m = await api.sensors.getMagnetometer(); return { accel: a ? ('Acc x:' + a.x.toFixed(2) + ' y:' + a.y.toFixed(2) + ' z:' + a.z.toFixed(2)) : 'Accelerometro: non disponibile', gyro: g ? ('Giro x:' + g.x.toFixed(2) + ' y:' + g.y.toFixed(2) + ' z:' + g.z.toFixed(2)) : 'Giroscopio: non disponibile', mag: m ? ('Mag x:' + m.x.toFixed(2) + ' y:' + m.y.toFixed(2) + ' z:' + m.z.toFixed(2)) : 'Magnetometro: non disponibile' }; } } };
